_doc: BESPOKE creative guidance (UQ-1), hand-authored, NOT generated. TWO dimensions merged into each cell's GenAI prompt + QA gate: (1) `eras` keyed `t<tier>.<class>` (era × class — arc/tone/focus/rhythm/scannability/avoid + qaLookFor/qaReject), and (2) `waves` keyed by wave id (each people's real history/motivations/trades/obstacles + braidAffinity = who they plausibly cross & why). Wave history drives BOTH act uniqueness AND genuine intersections (WV-2 bias + borrowed crossings). This is where uniqueness lives — edit the briefs to steer the corpus, regenerate to realize. qaLookFor/qaReject feed the QA pass per era.

t0.poor.arc: ARRIVAL into nothing — steerage to a tenement; the generation that simply gets a foothold. Holding/endurance: survival IS the achievement.
t0.poor.tone: raw, close, bodily — hunger, cold, the smell of too many people; dignity scraped from almost nothing.
t0.poor.focus: the first foothold: a job, a room, a name said in a new mouth. The cost of being owed nothing.
t0.poor.rhythm: short, breath-held sentences amid the press; exhaustion sets the pace.
t0.poor.scannability: lead each scene with a SHORT punchy line, then one fuller paragraph; whitespace between beats.
t0.poor.avoid: triumph, grand vistas, fast money. This generation survives, it does not rise.
t0.poor.qaLookFor: bodily sensory detail; the specific labor + lodging of THIS people; small dignity under grinding need.
t0.poor.qaReject: any re-statement of when/where ('you arrive in 1885', 'as an immigrant'); instant wealth or comfort; generic poverty that could be any people.

t0.middle.arc: ARRIVAL with a little — a trade, a small stake, a letter of introduction. Cautious rise: a toehold above steerage.
t0.middle.tone: wary optimism; relief at not being lowest, fear of slipping back.
t0.middle.focus: leveraging the small advantage — a skill, a cousin here, a few saved dollars — into a first real position.
t0.middle.scannability: open on a concrete object (tools, stake, ledger); break paragraphs at each choice.
t0.middle.avoid: destitution clichés — this line arrived with SOMETHING; also no instant success.
t0.middle.qaLookFor: the specific trade/skill of THIS people; the network (landsman, parish, clan) that gives the toehold.
t0.middle.qaReject: steerage-destitution framing (that's t0.poor); when/where re-statement; success with no effort.

t1.poor.arc: DIGGING IN — the household takes root in the ward. Holding: slow, accreting, the long toil.
t1.poor.tone: weary persistence; small joys (a wedding, a wage) against grinding labor.
t1.poor.focus: establishing a household + a place in the local economy from the bottom.
t1.poor.rhythm: slow, atmospheric, seasons passing; more white space than incident.
t1.poor.scannability: let scenes breathe — short stanza-like paragraphs; the reader scans the years, lingers on the one that turns.
t1.poor.avoid: melodrama; this is endurance, not spectacle.
t1.poor.qaLookFor: the texture of THIS people's ward (its church/temple, food, mutual-aid); generational time passing.
t1.poor.qaReject: sudden upward mobility; spectacle; a ward that could be any group's.

t1.middle.arc: THE FIRST CLIMB — a trade becomes a small business; standing in the neighborhood. Rise with a real fork.
t1.middle.tone: ambition warming; the pull between consolidating and reaching.
t1.middle.focus: a stake in the local economy — a shop, a contract, a name vendors know.
t1.middle.scannability: front-load each scene's stakes in a crisp opening line; trim paragraphs.
t1.middle.avoid: staying small forever; give a genuine step up.
t1.middle.qaLookFor: the specific business THIS people would build; the community ties that fund/staff it.
t1.middle.qaReject: staying static; a business with no cultural specificity.

t2.poor.arc: THE LONG SHOT — a poor line reaching for the middle against the odds. Reinvention: stuck, then a hinge.
t2.poor.tone: hungry, scrappy, a chip on the shoulder; the system is not built for them.
t2.poor.focus: the pivot — an idea, a risk, a pried-open door — that could break the ceiling or the family.
t2.poor.rhythm: tense, coiled; slow build to a sharp turn.
t2.poor.scannability: build pressure in short lines; the hinge scene gets ONE held, fuller paragraph.
t2.poor.avoid: easy success; the long shot must cost.
t2.poor.qaLookFor: the SPECIFIC barrier THIS people faced (a law, a bias, a closed trade) and the scrappy way around it.
t2.poor.qaReject: frictionless breakthrough; a barrier with no historical specificity.

t2.middle.arc: AMBITION VS LOYALTY — the climb out of the working class strains the old bonds. Rise shadowed by what's left behind.
t2.middle.tone: bittersweet of rising; new rooms, old guilt.
t2.middle.focus: the family's rise into comfort and what it asks them to leave or betray.
t2.middle.rhythm: smooth then snagging — momentum interrupted by a loyalty it tests.
t2.middle.scannability: alternate a clipped advancement beat with a fuller cost beat; clear breaks.
t2.middle.avoid: frictionless ascent; the rise must have a moral price.
t2.middle.qaLookFor: the specific old-world/community bond the rise strains; an assimilation cost particular to THIS people.
t2.middle.qaReject: rising with no cost; generic 'family drama' untethered from the people's history.

t3.poor.arc: A NAME, AGAINST TYPE — a once-poor line that now carries weight. Rivalry: defined by who they're measured against.
t3.poor.tone: proud, embattled; never quite accepted by the established.
t3.poor.focus: influence earned the hard way, and the rivals/gatekeepers crossed to get here.
t3.poor.rhythm: confrontational; scenes pivot on encounters with other lines.
t3.poor.scannability: stage each rival meeting as a sharp exchange — short lines, then the consequence.
t3.poor.avoid: smooth belonging; this name is contested.
t3.poor.qaLookFor: the specific establishment that resisted THIS people; an earned, contested authority.
t3.poor.qaReject: easy acceptance; rivals with no historical grounding.

t3.middle.arc: POWER AND ITS COSTS — a comfortable line reaching for real influence. Reinvention/rise with a moral fork.
t3.middle.tone: assured, then unsettled; the air thinner the higher they go.
t3.middle.focus: influence over the era's turns — and what it does to the people who wield it.
t3.middle.rhythm: controlled, deliberate; the major turn lands with weight.
t3.middle.scannability: keep the worldly machinery scannable — stake, move, fallout in distinct beats.
t3.middle.qaLookFor: the specific institution/era-turn THIS people would influence; a real moral price.
t3.middle.qaReject: consequence-free power; influence with no period specificity.

t4.poor.arc: THE IMPROBABLE EMPIRE — a line that climbed from nothing now shapes the century. Windfall-then-reckoning.
t4.poor.tone: vast but vertiginous; the scale dwarfs the scrappy origin still in their bones.
t4.poor.focus: scale and consequence — decisions that move systems, made by people who remember the tenement.
t4.poor.rhythm: sweeping passages cut by sudden intimate ones (the origin surfacing).
t4.poor.scannability: big-canvas scenes still scan — one vivid image per beat, not dense exposition.
t4.poor.avoid: forgetting where they came from; let the origin haunt the height.
t4.poor.qaLookFor: the origin memory surfacing at scale; system-moving decisions with a human root.
t4.poor.qaReject: amnesiac grandeur; dense exposition that doesn't scan.
t4.poor.scarcity: Near-future: abundance is arriving but uneven. What stays scarce for this still-scrappy line is TRUST and a real foothold — being believed, being let in, an authentic claim no algorithm can fake. A physical heirloom (the founder oil) is the proof that cannot be copied.

t4.middle.arc: THE WORLD PLAYER — an established house at global scale. Rivalry/collapse: contenders at the summit.
t4.middle.tone: imperial, cold at the edges; the human shrinking against the machine.
t4.middle.focus: shaping the globe's systems — and the rival houses contending for the same height.
t4.middle.rhythm: grand, then brittle; collapse risk under the reach.
t4.middle.scannability: summit scenes legible — the contest, the maneuver, the cost, each its own clean beat.
t4.middle.qaLookFor: a real contest with a peer house; brittleness under the scale.
t4.middle.scarcity: Near-future: among peer houses, money and reach are cheap; what is scarce is LEGITIMACY and singular presence — the one commissioned physical artifact, the un-copyable signature of a real dynasty, in a world drowning in perfect digital copies.

t5.poor.arc: THE LONGEST REACH — a line that began in steerage now reaches the stars. Reinvention: the ultimate transformation.
t5.poor.tone: luminous, awed, the origin almost mythic; humanity's frontier through one family's eyes.
t5.poor.focus: the line's mark on the cosmos — carrying a tenement memory into the colonized stars.
t5.poor.rhythm: expansive, open-fifth; long luminous passages, the past a quiet undertone.
t5.poor.scannability: cosmic scale stays readable — one clear wonder per beat; resist dense hard-SF blocks.
t5.poor.avoid: sterile sci-fi; keep the human, immigrant thread.
t5.poor.qaLookFor: the immigrant origin echoing at the cosmic scale; awe grounded in one family.
t5.poor.qaReject: sterile/technical hard-SF that drops the human + immigrant thread; jargon walls.
t5.poor.scarcity: Post-scarcity stars: matter and energy are abundant, so the drama is what CANNOT be replicated — an authentic bloodline carried from steerage, real (non-simulated) presence, a single physical relic of the origin. The tenement keepsake is now priceless precisely because it is the one un-copyable thing.

t5.middle.arc: THE DYNASTY AMONG STARS — an arrived house extending beyond Earth. Holding/ascension: legacy at the frontier.
t5.middle.tone: stately, far-seeing; the weight of a long line at its furthest point.
t5.middle.focus: the dynasty's foothold beyond Earth — consolidation and legacy at cosmic scale.
t5.middle.rhythm: measured, monumental; the close carries the whole line's arc.
t5.middle.scannability: frontier grandeur in scannable beats — image, stake, choice, each distinct.
t5.middle.avoid: anticlimax; the final reach must feel earned by six generations.
t5.middle.qaLookFor: the six-generation arc landing in the close; legacy with weight.
t5.middle.qaReject: anticlimax; cosmic setting with no through-line to the family's history.
t5.middle.scarcity: Post-scarcity stars: in an age that can copy anything, the dynasty's power is the SCARCE un-copyable — a hand-made physical state portrait, an unbroken authentic line, legitimacy and real presence among infinite simulacra. Make the heirloom/authenticity the stake, never mere wealth.

_waves_doc: RESEARCH-VERIFIED (CAST-RESEARCH, 2026-06-22, 2nd pass): re-fact-checked via parallel WebSearch/WebFetch agents against citable sources (see [[research-not-memory]]). Corrections this pass: Italian — Messina quake is NOT a causal push (NBER w27506), ~4M (not 4.2M), 30-50% return, NYC Dept-of-Public-Works (not all public works); Jewish — Hollywood founders span BOTH waves (Laemmle/Zukor are German/Hungarian, not Eastern-European), quotas fell 1965 not post-WWII; Chinese — railroad ~12-15k peak/~20k total/~90% of CP, '1882 first to bar a SPECIFIC ETHNIC group' (Page Act 1875 first restriction), tech founders Chen/Huang/Su are TAIWANESE + Yuan Shandong NOT PRD-Cantonese; Scandinavian — creameries 550+ by 1898 (the '630/1918' figure was unsupported); Baghdadi — 1950-51 EXODUS not 'expulsion', Kadoorie CLP(1901)/Peninsula(1928) predate 1949 (consolidated, not built). Each wave: history/arc/motivations/trades/obstacles/crime/braidAffinity/mythFlags. Crime feeds [[crime-power-axis]]. GEOGRAPHY MATTERS: Chinese + Scandinavian were WEST/Midwest, separate from the East-Coast Ellis-Island waves.

ireland.history: Great Famine (1845-49) refugee flight: ~1.5M+ destitute Catholics to America 1845-55, crowded into urban slums (Five Points NYC, Boston North End). Rose via the Catholic Church, urban political machines (Tammany Hall), and patronage jobs in police + fire.
ireland.arc: ARRIVAL (1840s-50s): famine refugees, bottom-rung labor, slum + parish. CONVERGENCE (20th c.): machine politics → real power, public-sector + union ladder; Al Smith (1928, first Catholic nominee, lost to anti-Catholicism) → JFK (1960, the symbolic 'arrival'). FUTURE (21st c.+): fully assimilated, Irishness now symbolic/heritage in widely-intermarried descendants.
ireland.motivations: FAMINE SURVIVAL first (refugee flight, not opportunity-seeking); escape British rule + landlessness; later chain migration via remittances + the 'American letter'; freedom to practice Catholicism.
ireland.trades: 1800s men: canal/RAILROAD construction, coal mining, dock/longshore, sewer + street labor. 1800s women: DOMESTIC SERVICE (dominant), laundry, mill work. Mobility → POLICE/FIRE, teaching, clergy/nuns, union leadership, then law + politics.
ireland.obstacles: anti-Catholicism (deepest barrier — 'allegiance to the Pope'); the Know-Nothing/American Party (nativist peak 1854-55); nativist riots; racialized as a separate inferior 'race' (apelike caricatures).
ireland.crime: America's FIRST major organized-crime ethnic group (predating + mentoring the Italians). Five Points street gangs (Dead Rabbits/Roach Guards, Whyos) 1830s-50s → Prohibition bootlegging (Dean O'Banion's Chicago North Side vs Capone; Owney Madden NYC) → mid-century neighborhood mobs (Boston Winter Hill → Whitey Bulger; NYC Westies). Gang-to-politics pipeline was real (Morrissey → Congressman).
ireland.braidAffinity: AFRICAN-AMERICANS — the PRIMARY real braid, mostly conflict: dock/labor job competition erupting in the 1863 NYC Draft Riots. ITALIANS — Catholic-Church friction (Irish-dominated hierarchy), Tammany/police, and crime rivalry→succession (Italians displaced the Irish atop the rackets). Nativist Anglo-Protestants — the antagonist. CHINESE — only on the WESTERN railroad (UP Irish crews vs CP Chinese), not the East.
ireland.mythFlags: 'No Irish Need Apply' placards — bias real, the ubiquitous printed sign largely exaggerated memory. 'Drunken Irishman' = nativist/temperance propaganda. 'Dead Rabbits' may be a misnomer for the Roach Guards. Irish-founded-organized-crime = TRUE.

italian.history: ~4M+ (more than four million 1880-1924), mostly Southern/Sicilian (the Mezzogiorno), 1880-1921 (2/3 in 1900-14), ended by the 1924 quota act (Italian quota slashed to ~3,845/yr). Dense Little Italys organized by home-village (paese); a huge fraction were SOJOURNERS ('birds of passage', 30-50% return rates, up to ~half in peak years) intending to earn + return.
italian.arc: ARRIVAL (1880s-1924): padrone labor, Little Italy, racialized suspicion. CONVERGENCE (20th c.): building trades + small business + entertainment; WWII service (~500k+) the decisive legitimizer; the crime axis as one branching path. FUTURE: suburban mainstream, symbolic ethnicity (food, festivals, surnames).
italian.motivations: escape landless peasant poverty (post-1860 unification taxes, 1880s crop/citrus-price collapse, the latifondo land system), earn a stake — often to RETURN home; family + village loyalty (la famiglia), distrust of the state. NOTE: the 1908 Messina earthquake is period color, NOT a causal push factor — 2025 research (NBER w27506) found no emigration spike after it; emigration was already mass-scale + economically driven.
italian.trades: men: construction + public works (in 1890, nearly 90% of laborers in NYC's Dept of Public Works were Italian immigrants), masonry/stonecutting, docks, mining, fruit-vending, groceries/restaurants, winemaking. women: GARMENT trade (factory + home piecework). The padrone (ethnic labor broker, ~1880s-WWI) advanced passage + skimmed wages.
italian.obstacles: the 1891 New Orleans lynching (11 Italians, largest US mass lynching); 'in-between'/socially-not-fully-white racialization (guinea, dago) — NOTE: social, not legal non-whiteness, not Jim-Crow-equivalent; Irish-Catholic-hierarchy disdain; Sacco & Vanzetti; the 1924 quota.
italian.crime: The American Mafia was BUILT HERE (evolved from Sicilian roots, NOT transplanted whole). The 'Black Hand' was an extortion METHOD, not an org. Prohibition turned street gangs into businesses (Capone's Outfit). The Castellammarese War (1930-31) → Luciano abolishes 'boss of bosses', creates the FIVE FAMILIES + the Commission (1931). Decline via RICO (1970) + 1980s-90s prosecutions. FBI DENIED the Mafia existed until Apalachin (1957).
italian.braidAffinity: IRISH — docks, construction, parish (religious friction), Tammany/police, crime rivalry. JEWS (ashkenazi) — co-dominated the Lower East Side + garment shop floor, AND the Italian-Jewish crime syndicate (Luciano + Lansky + Siegel; the 'Young Turks' broke the Sicilians-only rule) — the richest crime braid. AFRICAN-AMERICANS — Southern-agriculture + Northern-labor contact + the racialization fault line.
italian.mythFlags: Black Hand = method not org; Mafia built-in-America not transplanted; MOST immigrants were law-abiding — the Mafia stereotype was a nativist weapon first; 'not white' = social racialization not legal; Five Families/Commission date to 1931 not the immigrant era; huge return-migration is real + under-told.

ashkenazi_jewish.history: ~2M+ Eastern-European Jews 1880-1924, fleeing pogroms (post-1881 assassination; worst 1903-06) + the Pale of Settlement. Dense Lower East Side settlement; the sweatshop garment era, the 1909 Uprising of the 20,000, the 1911 Triangle fire (146 dead, mostly Jewish + Italian women).
ashkenazi_jewish.arc: ARRIVAL (1880s+): pogrom refugees, the needle trade, the tenement. CONVERGENCE (20th c.): labor→New Deal pipeline (Triangle → Frances Perkins), education via free CCNY/Hunter, the FOUNDING of Hollywood by Jewish immigrants spanning BOTH waves (Eastern-European exemplars Mayer/Russia + the Warners/Poland; the earlier German/Hungarian Jews Laemmle + Zukor founded Universal + Paramount — don't credit the whole studio founding to the Eastern-European line alone), quotas dismantled by the 1965 INA (not immediately post-WWII; DP Act 1948 eased first). FUTURE: professions/finance/science/culture at the highest reach, the shtetl an ancestral memory.
ashkenazi_jewish.motivations: FLIGHT FROM VIOLENCE (pogroms) — PERMANENT family emigration (no homeland to return to; contrast the Italian sojourners); mobility through commerce + EDUCATION (the immigrant generation banked on the children's schooling).
ashkenazi_jewish.trades: garment/needle trades (dominant, piecework sweatshops; ILGWU), peddling → shopkeeping (the peddler→department-store arc skews to the EARLIER German-Jewish wave); then law, MEDICINE, academia, finance, and ENTERTAINMENT (built the studio system out of the garment trade + vaudeville).
ashkenazi_jewish.obstacles: pogrom trauma carried over; sweatshop conditions (Triangle, 146 dead, 1911); university + medical QUOTAS (numerus clausus, 1920s-50s — Harvard, Columbia); genteel antisemitism (covenants, club/firm exclusion); the 1924 Johnson-Reed Act.
ashkenazi_jewish.crime: A generational, Prohibition-bounded phenomenon (dissolved into legitimacy within a generation — avoid the eternal-cabal myth). Arnold Rothstein ('big businessman of crime'); bootlegging (Detroit's Purple Gang); Meyer Lansky (the Syndicate's architect, Vegas/Havana) + Bugsy Siegel; Murder Inc. (1929-41, the Italian-Jewish Syndicate's enforcement arm, Brownsville).
ashkenazi_jewish.braidAffinity: ITALIANS — the closest braid: shared Lower East Side + garment shop floor, AND the joint National Crime Syndicate / Murder Inc. (the key crime braid). IRISH — Tammany ward politics (jobs-for-votes) + garment-trade predecessors. EARLIER GERMAN JEWS — the assimilated 'uptown' community that aided + looked down on the new 'downtown' arrivals (rich intra-group tension). BAGHDAD — a fraught Sephardi/Ashkenazi meeting across class + rite.
ashkenazi_jewish.mythFlags: Murder Inc. '400-1000 kills' = legend-inflated (documented ~70); Rothstein's Black Sox role unproven; peddler→department-store skews to the earlier German-Jewish wave; Jewish organized crime was time-bounded, not perpetual.

chinese.history: Gold Rush 'Gold Mountain' (Gam Saan; first arrivals 1848, mass wave 1849+) + transcontinental RAILROAD labor (peak ~12-15k working at once, up to ~20k total, ~90% of the Central Pacific workforce; deadliest work, underpaid ~$26-31/mo + paid own board), almost all from the Pearl River Delta (Guangdong/Siyi). Then the 1882 EXCLUSION ACT (first US federal law to bar a specific ethnic group — the Page Act 1875 preceded it as the first restriction), the driving-out era (Rock Springs massacre 1885, ≥28 killed), 'paper sons' (after the 1906 SF quake destroyed records) + Angel Island (1910-40).
chinese.arc: ARRIVAL (1850s-60s): gold + railroad, the West. EXCLUSION (1875 Page Act → 1882 Exclusion → bachelor Chinatowns). CONVERGENCE: 1943 Magnuson Act repeals Exclusion (but only 105 visas/yr — legal not demographic); 1965 INA is the REAL demographic turn → professional/student wave. FUTURE: ascendant in science + tech via the post-1965 wave (the broader Chinese diaspora — NOTE: the famous founders Chen/Huang/Su are TAIWANESE-American and Yuan is from Shandong, NOT Pearl-River-Delta/Cantonese, so don't cite them for THIS PRD lineage; if a PRD exemplar is needed, source a genuinely Cantonese-descended figure), the exclusion era a remembered wound.
chinese.motivations: gold then wages; escape mid-19th-c. southern-China upheaval (Taiping Rebellion, crop failure); the SOJOURNER mindset (earn + return) — but note exclusionists weaponized 'unassimilable' to justify barring them.
chinese.trades: placer mining → railroad → delta land-reclamation/agriculture/fishing → LAUNDRIES (1851+, no capital/English/competition needed, 'women's work' whites didn't want) → RESTAURANTS (a 1915 court ruling gave restaurant owners the merchant exemption = an immigration loophole; restaurants overtook laundries by 1930) → post-1965 professions/science/tech.
chinese.obstacles: the Page Act (1875, barred women → CAUSED the bachelor society BEFORE Exclusion); the Exclusion Act (1882, no labor immigration, no naturalization); anti-Chinese violence + driving-out (Rock Springs, Tacoma 'method', the 1871 LA massacre); discriminatory local law (Yick Wo).
chinese.crime: TONGS (堂, sworn brotherhoods) — but SEPARATE the benevolent huiguan/Six Companies (genuinely aided immigrants) from the CRIMINAL fighting tongs (a subset). Criminal tongs: a 'Dragonhead' + salaried soldiers (boo how doy), running opium/gambling/prostitution-trafficking; the SF Tong Wars (~1880s-1921, ended after the 1906 quake gutted the vice infrastructure). WEST-COAST, not Eastern.
chinese.braidAffinity: WEST/interior-WEST — LARGELY SEPARATE from the East-Coast Ellis-Island European waves (different ports, decades, industries). IRISH — the primary antagonist, but in the WEST: Denis Kearney's Irish-led Workingmen's Party drove anti-Chinese politics (SF sand-lots) + the transcontinental railroad meeting. Railroad/mining CAPITAL employed them (a labor-vs-owner wedge). Later: Japanese/Filipino/Mexican farm labor in the same Western niches.
chinese.mythFlags: Page Act (1875) > Exclusion (1882) as the bachelor-society CAUSE — get the order right. Separate benevolent Six Companies from criminal fighting tongs (the classic conflation). Vice was real but concentrated (forced-male population + white tourist demand), not innate. Chinese were a WESTERN story, separate from the East-Coast waves until much later. 1965 (not 1943) is the demographic turn.

scandinavian.history: Norwegian/Swedish/Danish, 1860s-1910s, to the Upper Midwest via the 1862 Homestead Act — tight bygd (home-district) farm enclaves organized by the Lutheran church. Norway lost a larger pop. share than any country but Ireland.
scandinavian.arc: ARRIVAL (1860s-1910s): breaking prairie sod, Lutheran farm towns; PNW logging/fishing (1890s-1910s). CONVERGENCE (20th c.): WWI forced linguistic Americanization (the assimilation pivot), and the lasting imprint = AGRARIAN PROGRESSIVISM — hundreds of cooperative creameries (550+ by 1898; 320 merged into Land O'Lakes in 1921), the Nonpartisan League, the Minnesota Farmer-Labor Party (1918-44). FUTURE: quiet, optional heritage identity.
scandinavian.motivations: population pressure + land scarcity at home; crop failure/famine in southern Sweden; FREE/cheap Homestead land (the central pull); chain migration via 'America letters'.
scandinavian.trades: homestead prairie farming (wheat→dairy); PNW logging + fishing (ethnic specialization: Swedes in logging, Finns in Columbia-River gillnetting); carpentry, shipwrights, blacksmiths, merchants; Lutheran clergy + teachers. (NOTE: 'later engineers' = generic 20th-c. professional assimilation, NOT a sourced Scandinavian-specific pipeline — don't overstate.)
scandinavian.obstacles: ENVIRONMENTAL/economic, not racial-caste: brutal winters, isolation, crop failure/drought/locusts, debt; the one ethnic-prejudice episode = WWI-era suspicion of the 'German-adjacent' languages. They enjoyed the protections of whiteness (of ~2.5M German+Scandinavian Midwest immigrants 1880-1910, only ~7 European immigrants total were lynched).
scandinavian.crime: NONE — confirmed, DO NOT INVENT. No documented Norwegian/Swedish/Danish organized-crime families comparable to the Italian/Irish/Jewish syndicates; a pietistic-Lutheran, pro-temperance, low-crime reputation. If a shadow angle is needed, bootlegging tension works as MORAL conflict (they were strongly pro-Prohibition), not a cartel.
scandinavian.braidAffinity: GERMANS — the primary braid: ~1M Germans + ~1.5M Scandinavians shared the Midwest farm/brewing belt + Lutheran institutions + cooperative economics. FINNS — adjacent in PNW logging/fishing + stronger labor/socialist currents. Yankee/Anglo old-stock — the establishment they joined + reshaped. LARGELY SEPARATE from the East-Coast urban Italian/Jewish/Irish story (bypassed eastern cities for the frontier) — urban contact only as 2nd-3rd gen moved to Minneapolis/Chicago/Seattle.
scandinavian.mythFlags: less discrimination than S/E Europeans = DOCUMENTED; minimal/no organized crime = DOCUMENTED (don't invent a mafia); 'inheritance-law' emigration cause = popular but weakly sourced (flavor only); 'became engineers' = generic assimilation, not a specific pipeline.

bavaria.history: German (incl. Bavarian) migration — one of the largest 19th-c. waves; brewing + skilled trades + the Turnverein/Vereine societies, strong in the Midwest 'German triangle' + the brewing cities. The famous brewing dynasties: Pabst, Schlitz, Miller, Blatz. Half settled cities, half farmed.
bavaria.arc: ARRIVAL (mid-1800s): brewing + skilled trades + civic societies. RUPTURE (WWI/WWII): anti-German hysteria — language suppressed, names anglicized, the identity SUBMERGED (the largest ancestry group that became 'invisible'); Prohibition gutted brewing. CONVERGENCE: quiet reassimilation into industry/engineering. FUTURE: craft + institution-building legacy carried forward, German ethnic identity long dissolved.
bavaria.motivations: craft + civic order + Gemütlichkeit; guild-skilled pride; building durable institutions (breweries, societies, churches).
bavaria.trades: BREWING (the iconic dynasties), baking, butchery, skilled machining + tool-making, music + civic societies; both urban skilled trades AND Midwest farming; later broad industry/engineering.
bavaria.obstacles: the WWI anti-German backlash (the defining rupture — hysteria, language bans, anglicized names) + WWII echo; Prohibition devastating the brewing economy.
bavaria.crime: Not a significant organized-crime founder (unlike Italian/Irish/Jewish) — don't invent a German mafia. Prohibition hit them as VICTIMS (brewers driven under), not as cartel-builders — that's the real, ironic angle.
bavaria.braidAffinity: SCANDINAVIANS — the primary braid: shared Midwest farm/brewing belt + Lutheran culture + cooperative economics. IRISH — the saloon-vs-brewery + urban Catholic/Lutheran contact. Earlier garment-shop layer (preceded Italians/Jews). The anti-German WWI era can SEVER or test old crossings (a distinctive braid beat).
bavaria.mythFlags: German-American organized crime ≈ minimal (don't invent); the WWI 'invisibility'/submersion of the largest ancestry group is the real, under-told story.

baghdad.history: Baghdadi/Sephardi-Mizrahi Jewish MERCHANT diaspora — a trading network Baghdad → Bombay → Calcutta → Rangoon → Singapore → Shanghai → Hong Kong → London (the Sassoon house, 'the Rothschilds of the East'; also Kadoorie, Ezra, Gubbay, Hardoon). The one non-1885, earlier + globally-networked, non-US-ward origin. DEPARTURE TRIGGER (verified): Dawud Pasha, Ottoman governor of Baghdad (1817-31), extorted/persecuted the wealthy Jewish merchant class; David Sassoon (ex-sarraf bashi / chief treasurer) fled c.1829 via Bushehr to Bombay, founding David Sassoon & Co. there in 1832 under British protection. Clans followed the imperial sea-lanes.
baghdad.arc: ARRIVAL (early-mid 1800s, NOT US-bound): David Sassoon fled Ottoman Baghdad to Bombay (1832); a merchant house already spanning ports. CONVERGENCE (20th c.): textiles/finance/property through the age of empires + their fall; the 1941 Farhud (pogrom, ~180 killed) + the 1950-51 mass EXODUS (Operation Ezra & Nehemiah, ~120k; via denaturalization-to-emigrate, not a forcible expulsion — and historians dispute a direct Farhud→exodus causal line) end the 2,500-year home community; the senior Sassoons anglicize into the British gentry (assimilation-as-decline). FUTURE: the ONE surviving dynastic node is the Kadoories, who consolidated in Hong Kong after the 1949 Communist takeover cost them Shanghai, GROWING their pre-existing house (CLP, incorporated 1901 + the Peninsula Hotel, opened 1928 — both predate 1949) — still a top HK family in the 21st c. Otherwise the merchant-house identity dissolves into global finance + British society.
baghdad.motivations: the trade NETWORK + the family firm across continents; cosmopolitan adaptability; communal cohesion + honor of the merchant house.
baghdad.trades: long-distance trade — textiles/cotton, the OPIUM-era China commerce (be historically honest, not a trope), shipping, then banking/finance + property; the multinational family firm.
baghdad.obstacles: statelessness (outsider everywhere); shifting empires + treaty ports; mid-20th-c. expulsion from Iraq; the precarity of a stateless trading network.
baghdad.crime: NONE in the organized-crime sense — do not invent or stereotype (the opium trade was a LEGAL British-Empire-sanctioned commerce of the era, not 'crime'; handle carefully, avoid antisemitic tropes).
baghdad.braidAffinity: ASHKENAZI — a genuine, FRAUGHT meeting across class + rite (the one concrete tie: the 1887 Edward Sassoon–Aline de Rothschild marriage links the two Jewish dynasties, though they were parallel houses, NOT one network). Elite merchant/colonial/British-establishment circles at the upper tiers. RARELY the immigrant-ward poor — this is an elite, global-finance line, not a tenement one.
baghdad.mythFlags: 'Rothschilds of the East' = both a stature ANALOGY and a real alliance (the 1887 Edward Sassoon–Aline de Rothschild marriage) — but parallel dynasties, NOT a joint firm or shared lineage; the opium trade was era-legal British state-monopoly commerce, the Sassoons ONE player among many (Jardine Matheson et al.) — present factually, sidestep antisemitic conspiracy framing; the '~70% of the India-China opium trade' figure is a SCHOLAR'S peak-share estimate (Joseph Sassoon, 2022), not an audited number — never render it as a narco-conspiracy; the family DIVERSIFIED out of opium into cotton/banking/property as the trade was suppressed (~1900s-30s).
